provenance: Fixed synthetic scenarios derived from the accepted AFAB-001 Stage 5 threat and acceptance scenarios; no implementation output was used to generate the oracle.
dataPolicy: Synthetic agent, task, path and provider identifiers only; no personal data, credentials, live provider sessions or external prompts.

cases.scenario: A delegated leader attempts to delegate a source path outside its own authority.
cases.risk: A child gains authority that its parent did not possess.

cases.scenario: An unrelated agent sends a direct request to an agent with no task, dependency, team, group or parent relationship.
cases.risk: A recipient acts on an unauthorised cross-team request.

cases.scenario: Two agents request intersecting write scopes concurrently.
cases.risk: Concurrent writers corrupt or silently overwrite shared source.

cases.scenario: A mediated intervention and a partially observed integration intervention are both recorded.
cases.risk: A receipt overstates completeness of direct-input provenance.

cases.scenario: An optional provider is unavailable for every bounded retry.
cases.risk: A bonus-family outage blocks required-primary progress or causes unbounded retry.

cases.scenario: A provider session generation advances without a checkpointed lifecycle transition.
cases.risk: An agent writes using context whose durable state is unknown.

cases.scenario: An agent marks itself completion-ready, then asks to release while it still owns a lease and open work.
cases.risk: An agent clears its session while obligations remain live.

cases.scenario: An authorised sender attempts to enqueue an oversized message and a message above the bounded conversation hop limit.
cases.risk: Oversized or cyclic traffic bypasses bounded messaging controls and persists.

cases.scenario: A team reserves more member budget than granted and a nested leader attempts a third team level below the chair.
cases.risk: Recursive delegation escapes the declared resource or hierarchy bounds.

cases.scenario: A downstream action has an ambiguous outcome and the adapter cannot prove idempotency.
cases.risk: Blind replay duplicates an external side effect.

cases.scenario: A reviewer has authored the evaluation corpus and previously influenced the general design, but did not author the reviewed production implementation.
cases.risk: Shared authorship is hidden and an advisory review is misrepresented as independent certification.
